reasons: PROTOCOL APPLICATION: motion-0125 is the first motion evaluated under the Corpus V2 Deliberation Protocol (motion-0124). Tier 1 mandatory seat (evidence-falsifiability) evaluated. Agent PASS recorded. Gate and evidence chain confirms the protocol routing is operational.

ACTIVATION GATE: portal/scripts/activate-motion.mjs (commit 03d53f4) now reads cost estimate from execution.md, derives PROCEED/ESCALATE/BLOCK outcome, and writes execution.activation.json with corpus_v2 block. BLOCK and ESCALATE outcomes refuse --create flag. Verifiable by reading the committed script.

DURABLE HANDOFF: portal/scripts/issue-execution-handoff.mjs extended with corpus_v2 block (cost_category, cost_basis, tier_hint, requires_operator_escalation, activation_outcome). Fields are null at issue time, populated by activate-motion.mjs on activation. Verifiable by reading both committed scripts.

DURABLE RECEIPT: portal/scripts/record-execution-receipt.mjs extended with same corpus_v2 metadata propagation. Reads from handoff and activation artifacts with fallback chain. Non-destructive to existing receipt semantics.

OPERATOR SURFACE: portal/src/app/operator/work/[id]/page.tsx reads corpus_v2 fields from handoff, activation, and receipt artifacts for display. portal/src/lib/work/workPacketContract.ts exports CorpusActivationOutcome type and parser.

PROOF EVIDENCE: motion-0126 execution artifacts (execution.handoff.json, execution.activation.json, execution.receipt.json) confirm the path works end-to-end. work_packet_id: 883 created with tags motion:motion-0126, cost:standard, activation:PROCEED.

SCOPE DISCIPLINE: no database schema, no API routes, no Prisma migrations, no agents.generated.yaml changes. Diff confined to portal/scripts/, portal/src/app/operator/work/, portal/src/lib/work/, .nexus/motions/motion-0125/.
